finding.rootCause: The same server-side protected /paradise route was mounted on both fimamacro.com and api.fimamacro.com. The Fima user session cookie is intentionally host-only to api.fimamacro.com, so a normal navigation on the frontend host could not perform server-side API-cookie authentication and returned raw JSON 401.

correctArchitecture.apiDirectNavigation: https://api.fimamacro.com/paradise redirects to the owner-facing URL

authentication.wrongUserBehavior: Clean access-restricted UI; protected API returns 403 JSON
authentication.denialLogging: User ID plus masked Discord ID and reason code only

cookieAndCorsAudit.userCookieDomain: Host-only api.fimamacro.com; intentionally retained as the narrower scope
cookieAndCorsAudit.mutationOriginPolicy: Only official frontend and API origins

localVerification.ownerState: Console visible; 3 template cards, 18 channel mappings, 12 role mappings and 3 guide actions
